scripts.check: git -C ../.. ls-files -- apps/auth | xargs pnpm --dir ../.. exec ultracite check
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/email build && portless --name auth.tskr node ../../scripts/local-postgres-launcher.mjs -- tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.e2e:dev: pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/email build && portless run --name e2e-auth.tskr --app-port 4792 --force node ../../scripts/local-postgres-launcher.mjs -- tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/email build && tsc --project tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/email build && node ../../scripts/local-postgres-launcher.mjs -- sh -lc 'pnpm --filter @workspace/db db:migrate && vitest run'
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @workspace/db build && pnpm --filter @workspace/email build && tsc --project tsconfig.json --noEmit
